mapper.select: SELECT id, keyword, emotion_type, weight, status, create_time, update_time FROM emotion_keyword WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY emotion_type, weight DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emotion_keyword (keyword, emotion_type, weight, status) VALUES (#{keyword}, #{emotionType}, #{weight}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE emotion_keyword SET keyword = #{keyword}, emotion_type = #{emotionType}, weight = #{weight}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE emotion_keyword SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, keyword, emotion_type, weight, status, create_time, update_time FROM emotion_keyword WHERE keyword LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY emotion_type, weight DESC

SELECT id, keyword, emotion_type, weight, status, create_time, update_time FROM emotion_keyword WHERE keyword LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY emotion_type, weight DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emotion_keyword WHERE keyword LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emotion_keyword WHERE emotion_type = #{emotionType}
SELECT id, keyword, emotion_type, weight, status, create_time, update_time FROM emotion_keyword ORDER BY emotion_type, weight DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
